description: Code review fixes: clear stale trade offers on phase transition, add phase guards to trade actions, cap request slider max to target player resources, show rule violation message on insufficient funds, gate trade button behind hotseat mode
steps: 1. In src/store/gameStore.ts, in doInitiateWar (the politics-to-war transition), clear tradeOffers by adding tradeOffers: [] to the state update.
2. In src/store/gameStore.ts, add a phase guard at the top of doSendTrade: if currentPhase !== 'politics', return early.
3. In src/store/gameStore.ts, add a phase guard at the top of doAcceptTrade: if currentPhase !== 'politics', return early.
4. In src/components/TradeModal.tsx, replace the hardcoded max={20} on request sliders with the selected target player's actual coins/ronin.
5. In src/store/gameStore.ts, in doAcceptTrade, when resources are insufficient, set ruleViolationMessage to inform the user before removing the offer.
6. In src/components/ActionPanel.tsx, gate the TRATO button behind gameState.mode === 'hotseat'.
acceptance_criteria: Trade offers are cleared when transitioning from politics to war
doSendTrade returns early if currentPhase is not politics
doAcceptTrade returns early if currentPhase is not politics
Request coin slider max equals the selected target player's actual coins
Request ronin slider max equals the selected target player's actual ronin
When accepting a trade with insufficient funds, a rule violation message is shown
TRATO button only appears in hotseat mode
Build passes with npm run build
